violations.text: Blue laminate lining on countertops were observed in poor repair in several areas. Equipment to be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2027
1 door cooler out of service prior to inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025
Milk cooler gaskets for small unit was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2026
1 door cooler out of service prior to inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, pest excrement and other debris: 1. shelving in dry storage room 2. bottom shelves of prep line 3. large cart New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

The floors under the dishmachine have an accumulation of soil residue, pest excrement and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

The establishment's Rhode Island Food Protection Manager License is expired. FMC must re-instate. Food Safety Certificate active. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the large milk unit have an accumulation of ice build. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The floor and some shelves at the storage room has a slight accumulation of old mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The floor behind 2 door reach-in has an accumulation of soil residue and mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The presence of rodent is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings at the storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The floor and shelves at the dry storage room has an accumulation of soil residue and mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The presence of rodent is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings at the storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control reports must be submitted to inspector by next re-inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

Beneath to cleaning cabinet has an accumulation of soil residue mice droppings and rodent burrows. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair and clean. E New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
The non-food contacts surfaces of the 2-door reach-in unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt at the fans inside of unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
